requirement_topic.en: ST RK / GOST / IEC 62109 Safety Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: ST RK / GOST / IEC 62109安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: ST RK / GOST / IEC 62109安全證據

summary.en: Kazakhstan standards practice uses national ST RK standards, interstate GOST standards, and direct or adopted international standards through KazStandard and EAEU conformity routes. For PV inverters, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 safety reports are commonly relevant technical evidence, especially when a purchaser, bank, EPC, or conformity body asks for internationally recognized inverter safety documentation.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦标准实践通过KazStandard和EAEU符合性路径使用国家ST RK标准、州际GOST标准以及直接或采纳的国际标准。对于光伏逆变器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全报告通常是相关技术证据，尤其是在采购方、银行、EPC或符合性机构要求国际认可的逆变器安全文件时。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦標準實踐通過KazStandard和EAEU符合性路徑使用國家ST RK標準、州際GOST標準以及直接或採納的國際標準。對於光伏逆變器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全報告通常是相關技術證據，尤其是在採購方、銀行、EPC或符合性機構要求國際認可的逆變器安全文件時。

standards_or_laws: ST RK standards and Kazakhstan national standardization procedures
GOST interstate standards where adopted or referenced
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers often hold IEC 62109 CB reports alongside GB/T 37408-2019 product documentation. This is usually stronger export evidence than a China-only GB/T declaration, but it still needs model-scope, factory, firmware, and national-deviation review for Kazakhstan/EAEU use.
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常在GB/T 37408-2019产品文件之外持有IEC 62109 CB报告。这通常比仅有中国GB/T声明更有利于出口证据，但仍需针对哈萨克斯坦/EAEU用途审查型号范围、工厂、固件和国家差异。
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常在GB/T 37408-2019產品文件之外持有IEC 62109 CB報告。這通常比僅有中國GB/T聲明更有利於出口證據，但仍需針對哈薩克斯坦/EAEU用途審查型號範圍、工廠、韌體和國家差異。

standards_or_laws: IECEE CB Scheme reports where available

gap.en: Kazakhstan buyers may accept IEC 62109 as persuasive technical evidence, but the acceptance path is contractual or conformity-body specific. Exporters should not assume IEC 62109 automatically resolves ST RK, GOST, TR CU, language, marking, or grid-connection requirements.
gap.zh: 哈萨克斯坦买方可能将IEC 62109作为有说服力的技术证据，但接受路径取决于合同或符合性机构。出口商不应假定IEC 62109自动解决ST RK、GOST、TR CU、语言、标志或并网要求。
gap.zht: 哈薩克斯坦買方可能將IEC 62109作為有說服力的技術證據，但接受路徑取決於合同或符合性機構。出口商不應假定IEC 62109自動解決ST RK、GOST、TR CU、語言、標誌或併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific unless a Kazakhstan/EAEU conformity body or procurement document makes the cited ST RK, GOST, or IEC standard mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or export-project evidence; GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended China standard and IEC 62109 is typically used for international certification

source.publisher: Kazakhstan Institute of Standardization and Metrology (KazStandard)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62109 and CB reports are useful but should be mapped into the Kazakhstan ST RK/GOST/EAEU file instead of treated as a standalone approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62109和CB报告有用，但应映射进哈萨克斯坦ST RK/GOST/EAEU文件，而不是视为独立批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62109和CB報告有用，但應映射進哈薩克斯坦ST RK/GOST/EAEU文件，而不是視為獨立批准。
